Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}One of the judges saw a lot of potential in you as an artist and had an offer for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}If you're interested, they'd be willing to help arrange for you to study abroad. How does that sound?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Hey, are you guys from the art club!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Um, he's in the faculty office now for—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Hiraga! I've been looking everywhere for you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Huh? Oh! Okay, got it, I'll be right there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I'm very sorry, but I'll need some time to think about this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 200}He says he doesn't want to be a doctor...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 21 0 200}But he just can't ignore people in need. That's how he is.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 21 0 200}A doctor's son with such an eye for art... I never thought I'd be so jealous of a student.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I don't think anyone's in the mood to celebrate now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I'll let everyone know what happened. You can head off now if you'd like.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I said goodbye to Fuuka and[n]went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
